# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This repository (`moaiy-com/moaiy-com`) is actively supported only on the latest default branch.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| `main` (latest) | :white_check_mark: |
| Older branches / historical commits | :x: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not** report security vulnerabilities in public GitHub issues.

Report vulnerabilities privately by email:

- **Email**: `support@moaiy.com`
- **Subject**: `[SECURITY] <short title>`
- **Include**:
  - Affected URL/page/component
  - Reproduction steps (PoC if possible)
  - Impact assessment
  - Suggested remediation (optional)

If GitHub private vulnerability reporting is enabled for this repository, you may also use GitHub Security Advisories.

## Response Process

- Initial acknowledgment: **within 72 hours**
- Triage and severity assessment: **within 7 business days**
- Fix timeline: based on severity and exploitability

We will keep you updated during triage and remediation.

## Disclosure Policy

Please allow us reasonable time to investigate and deploy a fix before public disclosure.
We will credit responsible reporters (unless you prefer to remain anonymous).

## Scope

This policy covers this website repository (`moaiy-com/moaiy-com`).
If the issue is in another Moaiy repository (for example application/runtime code), report it through the same channel and include the affected repository name.
